calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

James M. Millar, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 515-523 Broadway, LLC.
Ben Lee, President of 515-523 Broadway, LLC, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Naomi Taylor.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Ashley Tambriz was filed with the Clerk's Office on April 12, 2016.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 13, 2016.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court ruled in favor of plaintiff 515-523 Broadway, LLC, and against defendant Naomi Taylor as follows:

Past-Due Rent: WAIVED.
Holdover Damages - WAIVED.
Costs - $300.00.

Total: $300.00.

Additionally, Plaintiff 515-523 Broadway, LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 517 Broadway Street, #2, San Francisco, CA 94133. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar May-02-2016 Assigned To Trial Court
